label: Auroral Sump House
description: Auroral Sump House is a low, faceted residence set on a fused-silicate plinth above Seamglass Meridian’s shallow reflective shallows. Its vitrified tile skin is scored into grounded gutters that draw electrostatic glass dust into a central lensing cistern, leaving the exterior perpetually clean-lined and light-reactive. Interior partitions are formed from translucent slagglass panels that refract the city’s calibrated twilight bands into strict, navigational color bars. A narrow roofwalk mounts fixed mirror slats aligned to the outer ring of pylons, integrating the dwelling into the city’s auroral timekeeping regimen.
